hub.title: Skill Hub
hub.description: Manage AI coaching skills, upload training materials, and track quality
hub.emptyBody: Upload training materials to create your first AI coaching skill, or import a skill package.
hub.createDialogDescription: Choose how to create your skill

conversion.completed: Skill generated successfully. Please review the content.
conversion.failed: Conversion failed. Check your materials and try again.

quality.notEvaluated: Quality has not been evaluated. Request a review to see results.

fileTree.selectFile: Select a file from the tree to preview

confirm.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? This will permanently remove the skill and all associated resources. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.archiveMessage: Archive "{{name}}"? The skill will no longer be available for new training sessions. Existing associations will show a warning.
confirm.publishWarning: Quality score is {{score}}/100. Some dimensions need improvement. Publish anyway?
confirm.publishBlock: Quality score is {{score}}/100. The skill cannot be published until the score is at least 50.
confirm.staleEvaluation: The content has changed since the last quality evaluation. Consider re-evaluating before publishing.
